templates.name: .Cisco Switch
templates.description:
Role template for Cisco switches (Catalyst WS-C, Nexus in switching role).
Assigned directly to hosts. Inherits metrics from linked base templates.

[network-tool]
manufacturer = [ "Cisco" ]
device_role = [ "Access Switch", "Aggregation Switch", "Distribution Switch", "Core Switch", "TOR Switch" ]
device_types = [ "WS-C4948", "WS-C4948-10GE", "WS-C3850-48U-S", "WS-C3850-24T-S", "WS-C3850-48P-S", "WS-C3750E-24TD-S", "WS-C3750E-48TD-S", "WS-C3750X-24", "WS-C3750X-48", "WS-C3750-48TS", "WS-C3560E-48TD-S", "WS-C3560E-24TD-S", "WS-C3560X-24", "WS-C3560X-48", "WS-C3550-48-SMI", "WS-C3550-24-SMI", "WS-C2960G-24TC-L", "WS-C2960G-48TC-L", "WS-C2960S-48TS-L", "WS-C2960S-24TS-L", "WS-C2960-24TC-L", "WS-C2960-48TC-L", "WS-C2950T-48-SI", "WS-C2950-24", "WS-C2950-48", "C9200L-24T-4G", "C9200L-48T-4G", "C9300-24T", "C9300-48T", "C9500-24Q", "N5K-C5548UP", "N5K-C5596UP", "N7K-C7010", "N7K-C7018", "N3K-C3064PQ-10GE", "N3K-C3048TP-1GE", "N9K-C9372PX", "N9K-C9396PX", "N9K-C93180YC-FX", "N9K-C93240YC-FX2" ]
